channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping in household bins, 14th May
item.description:
Unknown person has been placing rubbish in our household bins without our permission. We are reporting this so the council is aware the waste does not belong to our property and does not confiscate our bins because of this.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Zangwill Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside No. 78 Brondesbury Villas, 14th May
item.description:
A television display table glass has been dumped
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Improperly disposed polystyrene, boxes, and furniture, 14th May
item.description:
I'm sorry to report another problem but someone left all this junk on the kerbside and it's blocking the passage. Can it please be removed?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Baby car seat and various junk, 14th May
item.description:
Hi there I have been walking down church lane for the past week and this box keeps moving in between streets but nobody reported it yet. I was wondering if it can be collected please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags of waste left outside Urban Nest on Court Street causing rubbish across shared entrance area, 14th May
item.description:
The neighbouring development Urban Nest, on Court Street, appears not to have been provided with proper bins or waste collection arrangements since residents moved in. Black bags of rubbish have been left outside for several weeks and have been ripped open, leaving waste scattered across the ground and entrance area used by neighbouring residents. This is creating hygiene concerns and risks attracting pests.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Widmore Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rocking paving slab o/s post office in Pickford Lane, 14th May
item.description:
Rocking paving slab o/s post office in Pickford Lane, B'Heath. Caller says that this is near the bus stop and could be dangerous. Caller could not give any further info on location but left his name/tel no
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass all over road, 14th May
item.description:
Someone has broken glass and it's all over the road and mainly has been swept along the kurb. I have had 2 punctures on my car this week on the same side. Please can a machine road sweeper come and go over the whole road stones and debris everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rutland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting all round, 14th May
item.description:
Nettles over 5feet high All around sides need trimming The whole area is a disgrace Wake up bromley and get your act together
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crowhurst Way, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kitchen cupboards, 14th May
item.description:
Left on the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holly Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Medium - 4 to 9 black bags problem has been found, 14th May
item.description:
A Fly-tip Medium - 4 to 9 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dyne Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: There is a Minivan worth of rubbish flytipped, 14th May
item.description:
There is a Minivan worth of rubbish flytipped behind Seaton point in bay 13. It has been dropped between 13/05/2026 at 10pm and 14/05/2026. There is also CCTV in the area.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nolan Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and excess leaves left to buil up over months, has now become a fire hazard, 14th May
item.description:
Rubbish and fallen leaves have been left for months to build up now causei g a fire hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marshall Path, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is on the wall of our front entrance of our block of flats, 14th May
item.description:
This has been here for 6 months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104, Consort Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A number of street lights are not working going from shallons road to five ways, 14th May
item.description:
About 4 street lights are not working and the area is very dark at night, with a risk of criminal activity that will not be seen
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer left on pavement, 14th May
item.description:
Resident of Canberra Road called today to state that there is a fridge freezer left outside someone property, this has been there for around 2 weeks. Please can this be removed as its blocking the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canberra Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned and untaxed vehicle, 14th May
item.description:
Unfamiliar car is not taxed and has been abandoned on public road for days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More abandoned road works signs, 14th May
item.description:
Some got taken yesterday (awesome) But some still remain

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bradbury Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road sign, 14th May
item.description:
Signage for road repair is still there after the work is completed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, Kirkdale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 14th May
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dyne Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Rubbish left on pavement, 14th May
item.description:
Rubbish, a pallet and rubbish bins on the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newman Close, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
